wikitext.*:
===Pokémon===
The only permanent member of Alain's team is {{TP|Alain|Charizard}}. When Charizard is not available for battle, Alain avoids participating in battles against other Trainers. However, he is seen using a few other Pokémon in his animated series appearances. During his appearance in {{aniseries|JN}}, it is revealed that Alain has become a [[Mega Stone]] researcher, which may indicate that other Pokémon on his team may also have access to [[Mega Evolution]].

This listing is of Alain's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

====In rotation====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Alain
|pkmn=Metagross
|stage1=Metang
|type1=Steel
|type2=Psychic
|img=Alain Metang.png
|img2=Alain Metagross.png
|epnum=XY116
|epname=The Synchronicity Test!
|desc={{p|Metagross}} first appeared as a {{p|Metang}} in ''[[XY116|The Synchronicity Test!]]'', where Alain used it in a battle against {{Ash}}. It went up against [[Ash's Noivern]], and following a close battle, emerged victorious.

In ''[[XY127|Analysis Versus Passion!]]'', the now fully evolved Metagross was used in Alain's battle against [[Remo]] in the semifinals of the [[Lumiose Conference]], but it was defeated by one of Remo's Pokémon.

It later reappeared in ''[[XY130|Finals Not for the Faint-Hearted!]]'', serving as Alain's fifth Pokémon in the Lumiose Conference finals, with [[Ash's Pikachu]] as its opponent. Despite putting up a good fight, it lost.

Metagross's known moves are {{m|Metal Claw}}, {{m|Psyshock}}, {{m|Meteor Mash}}, {{m|Agility}}, and {{m|Rock Slide}}.}}

|img=Alain Tyranitar.png

|desc={{p|Tyranitar}} was the first Pokémon used by Alain in his battle with {{Ash}} in the [[Lumiose Conference]] finals. It went up against [[Ash's Pikachu]], but was defeated.

Tyranitar's known moves are {{m|Dark Pulse}}, {{m|Stone Edge}}, and {{m|Crunch}}, and its Ability is {{a|Sand Stream}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Alain

|type2=Ice
|img=Alain Weavile.png
|epnum=XY130
|epname=Finals Not for the Faint-Hearted!

|desc={{p|Weavile}} was the second Pokémon Alain used to battle {{Ash}} in the [[Lumiose Conference]] finals. It first went up against [[Ash's Noivern]] and managed to beat him, but was subsequently taken down by {{AP|Hawlucha}}.

Weavile's known moves are {{m|Protect}}, {{m|Night Slash}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, and {{m|Double Team}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Alain
|pkmn=Bisharp
|type1=Dark
|type2=Steel
|img=Alain Bisharp.png
|epnum=XY130
|epname=Finals Not for the Faint-Hearted!
|vajp=
|vaen=Justin Anselmi
|desc={{p|Bisharp}} was Alain's third Pokémon used in his [[Lumiose Conference]] finals battle with {{Ash}}. It battled against [[Ash's Hawlucha]] and won, despite the massive type disadvantage. Afterwards, Alain temporarily [[recall]]ed it. It was [[XY131|later]] sent out again to face [[Ash's Goodra]]. Bisharp managed to defeat the {{type|Dragon}}, but not without taking serious damage itself, causing it to be swiftly defeated by [[Ash's Greninja]].

Bisharp's known moves are {{m|Thunder Wave}}, {{m|Guillotine}}, {{m|Iron Head}}, and {{m|Focus Blast}}.}}
